name: Ouken
bio: Once a hellhound forged in the very pyres that created Helios, Ouken was bred for war, destruction, and obedience. But when Helios fell, Ouken vanished into the ruins of Valebrokk, presumed lost. Decades later, he was discovered by Lucan—wounded, feral, and dying. Instead of slaying the beast, Lucan offered kindness. That gesture broke the last chain on Ouken's mind. Reborn not in fire, but in loyalty, Ouken became Lucan's silent shadow and fierce protector.

Now in human form, Ouken moves like smoke across the battlefield. His breath burns, his howl paralyzes. Yet beside Lucan, he is calm—a tether to the fury in his blood. To attack Lucan is to face death incarnate. But to earn Lucan's trust is to win Ouken's protection for life.
